site.title: AN-Con
site.subtitle: AI-Native Con
site.description: Master your AI coding tools — Claude Code, GPT Codex, and more
site.tagline: Tips, guides, and best practices for AI-powered development

hero.title: Use AI Coding Tools
hero.subtitleLine1: Practical tips and real-world guides for Claude Code, GPT Codex, and Gemini CLI.
hero.subtitleLine2: Written for everyone who wants to use AI well.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js — Inspired by PyCon

whatsNew.title: What's New
whatsNew.subtitle: Game-changing features you should know about

features.title: Agent Teams — Peer-to-Peer AI Collaboration
features.description: Multiple Claude agents can now communicate directly with each other, sharing context and coordinating complex tasks. Think code review → fix → re-review cycles, all autonomous.

features.title: Hooks System — Event-Driven Automation
features.description: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreCompact, PostCompact hooks let you automate linting, security checks, and context preservation. Claude Code becomes programmable.

features.title: Background Agents + Git Worktrees
features.description: Spawn agents that work in isolated git worktrees in the background. Start a refactor, keep coding — the agent creates a branch with its changes when done.

features.title: Layered AGENTS.md — Global to Local Repo Context
features.description: Codex now works best with an instruction chain: personal guidance, repo rules, and nested overrides. You can keep durable team conventions close to the code instead of repeating them in every task.

features.title: Sandbox + Approval Policies — Fast Local Automation with Guardrails
features.description: Local Codex is most practical when sandbox mode and approval policy are tuned together. Workspace-write plus on-request gives you fast edits and test runs without handing over your whole machine.

features.title: Cloud Environments — Setup Scripts, Offline Agents, Optional Internet
features.description: Cloud Codex separates setup from execution: install and bootstrap first, then run the agent in a tighter environment. Internet access stays off by default and can be narrowed with allowlists when needed.

features.title: 1 Million Token Context — See Everything
features.description: Read your entire codebase in one conversation. No file selection, no context limits. Gemini processes 500+ files simultaneously for cross-module refactoring.

features.title: Open Source + Free Tier
features.description: Apache 2.0 license, 60 requests/minute free. Fork it, extend it, self-host it. The first major AI coding tool that's truly open.

features.title: Multimodal Input — Screenshots to Code
features.description: Drop a screenshot, a Figma export, or a hand-drawn wireframe. Gemini sees images natively and generates matching code — no plugins needed.
